description.zh: Pix2Pix 表明，只要有配对的输入输出样本，许多图像转换任务都可以共享一个条件 GAN 框架。它让边缘到照片、地图到航拍图、标签到场景看起来像同一类学习问题的不同变体。
description.en: Pix2Pix showed that many image translation tasks could share one conditional GAN framework when paired input-output examples were available. It made edges-to-photos, maps-to-aerial images, and labels-to-scenes feel like variations of the same learning problem.

notes.zh: 由 legacy generated milestone 批量迁移，展示层默认 preserve-legacy，需后续人工细化 claims 与来源绑定。
notes.en: Batch migrated from generated legacy milestone; presentation defaults to preserve-legacy, with claims and source bindings needing later review.
